evals.prompt: I am getting on a call with a potential client tomorrow they run a home services company with 20 employees. What should I ask them?
evals.expected_output: Provide SPIN questions (2-3 Situation max), upfront contract script, 30-min call structure, and warning not to pitch before discovery.
expectations: The response provides SPIN questions: Situation, Problem, Implication, Need-Payoff
The response limits Situation questions to 2-3 maximum
The response includes an upfront contract script
The response provides a 30-minute call structure with time allocations
The response warns against pitching before discovery is complete

evals.prompt: I asked the prospect about their current setup and they said we use ServiceTitan. Then I immediately told them how our AI integrates with ServiceTitan. Was that the right move?
evals.expected_output: Diagnose the jump from Situation to pitch skipping Problem and Implication stages, and recommend specific follow-up questions.
expectations: The response identifies that jumping from Situation to pitch skipped Problem and Implication stages
The response explains the gap: actual pain was never discovered
The response provides specific questions to ask next to surface pain and implication
The response does not validate pitching at this stage

evals.prompt: The prospect said our biggest challenge is we are always busy but we never seem to make enough money. How do I dig into that?
evals.expected_output: Apply Sandler Pain Funnel (3 levels: describe, cost in dollars, personal stakes) AND Gap Selling root cause analysis.
expectations: The response applies the Sandler Pain Funnel with at least 3 levels
The response includes a Level 2 question about financial cost to the business
The response includes a Level 3 question about personal stakes
The response applies Gap Selling root cause analysis
